programme.desc: Comvita™ 10+ Manuka Honey is a premium honey from New Zealand that supports immunity and aids digestion. Night Rejuvenating Manuka Honey is the world’s first honey designed to protect the liver with rejuvenating properties that provides detoxification while you sleep. programme.desc: Crafted from 100% natural leaves including gymnema, mulberry and green tea, the Naturalle Sugar Care tea is mild-flavoured and low in calories. programme.title: Iron Finger
programme.desc: Tough cop Bruce Li arrives back in town in time to investigate a series of odd murders. Victims have two pierce marks on their necks. The killer is an expert in the Iron Finger strike. The fights are fantastic with the two Bruce's and Ku Feng going at it and all are excellent.

programme.title: The Night Porter
programme.desc: A concentration camp survivor rekindles her sadomasochistic relationship with an ex-SS officer working as a night porter at a Vienna hotel, but his former associates begin stalking them.

programme.title: Navajo Joe
programme.desc: The American West in the mid-1800's – a land beyond the reach of the law. A ruthless gang plunders the plains, murdering innocent Indian women and children to collect their scalps. One man stands in their way, a warrior hell-bent on revenge.

programme.desc: Two grand-theft-auto and best friends Adam & Hatim discovered a baby at the back seat of a stolen car. Keen to avoid detection, they take care of the baby while figuring out how to return the baby without getting caught

programme.title: Baby Jarum
programme.desc: Mami Jarum is back! and this time Mami is making sure her grand-daughter Asyikin will marry the man of her choosing, however Asyikin has a better plan (or worse!) for herself.

programme.title: Diari Chinta

programme.title: Kipas Belum Mati
programme.desc: Mia, seorang artis meningkat naik, membuka kelab peminatnya dan dibantu oleh Lynn yang menjadi pengurus. Dengan bantuan Lynn, kelabnya maju namun ada harga yang harus dibayar di sebalik kejayaan tersebut..

programme.title: Geng
programme.desc: Isabella is an ex-convict who has sworn off her life of crime. Unfortunately, her old gang boss wants her to do one last drug transaction and kidnaps her mother to blackmail Isabella. With the help of her high school best friends, Mariam and Anita, Isabella goes on a road trip to save her mother.

programme.title: Keabadian Cinta
programme.desc: 3 couples falls in love with each other in 3 different love stories.

programme.title: Boyfriend Aku Dari ...
programme.desc: After being disappointed multiple times, Risya is introduced by a friend to Andy, a nerdy young man. They fall in love but in actuality, Andy is a boyfriend from 'hell'!

programme.title: Gengster Leng Chai
programme.desc: Black is a failure of a gangster, being too soft hearted with people. After meeting Mawar, he is determined to change despite the objections of others.

programme.title: Strawberi Karipap Sesat Kat Paris
programme.desc: Nini and Haikal start their big adventure to find their aunty Lisa who gets a job offer as a professional photographer in Paris. Unfortunately, their journey turns upside down when they arrive in Paris and ruin a newly-wed coupleís honeymoon.

programme.title: Nota Silam
programme.desc: Munirah menjumpai sebuah nota cinta di dalam sebuah buku yang diperolehi secara rambang dari 'blind date with a book' dan cuba untuk menemukan pasangan di dalam nota tersebut yang merubah hidup Munirah

programme.title: Bukan Cerita Cinta Cliche
programme.desc: Seorang penulis skrip kisah-kisah cinta tetapi masih bersendirian mengimpikan cinta dalam kehidupan realitinya, lalu dia menyertai sebuah kumpulan terapi untuk berkongsi masalah peribadinya.

programme.title: Puyah & Putat
programme.desc: Kisah pengembaraan Puyah, seorang gadis kampung becok yang disukai ramai, apabila dia melawat Kuala Lumpur dan termasuk set filem secara tak sengaja, dan tak semena-mena mula mendapat nama sebagai pelakon.

programme.title: Kutinggalkan Cinta di Okinawa - EP26
programme.desc: Mengisahkan tentang Alisa yang cuba untuk menjejaki ibu kandungnya. Sepanjang perjalanan itu dia mengenali Raykal dan Shun. Siapakah di antara dua lelaki ini yang dapat memenangi hati Alisa?

programme.desc: A drama about love and family adapted from the Indomesian popular drama series/soap opera, "Syurga Yang Kedua". It tells the story of Sabrina who has difficulties in conceiving and doesn’t know that her husband has married her best friend Dr. Vanida during coma.

programme.desc: Calm, posed and serene, Andrea Pirlo, the architect of the Italian triumph of 2006, had a style very much of his own. But this was also true of Germany in 1990 and the strategies of Brazil's golden age.

programme.title: Football’s Greatest Stage - Charlton’s Midfield Magic - EP9
programme.desc: To remain England's top scorer for 45 years after his retirement, as a midfielder, is a truly remarkable exploit.

programme.title: Football Nation - Argentina - EP2
programme.desc: Argentina: cradle of Maradona, Messi and an uncompromising footballing culture.

programme.title: Football's Greatest Stage - Lionel Messi - EP1
programme.desc: Argentina's victory in 2022 confirmed that Lionel Messi was the greatest player of all time on football's biggest stage.

programme.title: Thomas Edison's Secret Lab - Helium Buffoons / When It Rains It Pours - EP121
programme.desc: The Antimatters send the whole Edison complex into the sky by pumping it full of helium and it’s up to Newtman (a.k.a. Kent) to save the day! / Angie invents a machine that can change the weather but, when Nicky falls into the beam, it’s her unruly emotions that alter the weather.

programme.title: Mellodees - Deck The Halls - EP19
programme.desc: It’s that time of year again! Grab some hot chocolate and your best dancing shoes to help Dee decorate the house!

programme.title: Casper the Friendly Ghost - Casper the Friendly Ghost Ep7 - EP107
programme.desc: Depressed by the antics of the other ghosts, Casper leaves home to make friends. After unintentionally scaring several potential pals, Casper befriends two young children. They take him home, where Casper frightens their mother. Casper is again upset because he believes that he will always scare away his potential buddies. However, Casper scares away a banker who is coming to foreclose on the woman's house, and this wins her heart for Casper.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage - Saving Klaus - EP108
programme.desc: Klaus is on loan to a local car museum, but the Shaq Paq gets the wrong idea and suits up for a clandestine rescue operation.

programme.title: The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat - The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat Ep6 - EP106
programme.desc: The beyond surreal adventures of Felix The Cat and his friends set in an incredibly weird and fantastical toon world where everything is alive and only dream logic rules. Each episode has three segments.

programme.title: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Kidaverse Roblox Rumble Ep4 - EP4
programme.desc: Eight kid gamers, ages eight to twelve, battle it out in ten different Roblox games to win prizes and find out who is the ultimate gamer! Video gamer, football star, and children’s book author Rashad Jennings hosts!

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Moral & Ethics - EP123
programme.desc: In this episode, we will go through everything related to Moral and Ethics. We will learn that morality helps us make good decisions and act responsibly all the time. We will also learn many valuable things about ethics and how to apply it in our lives, how it helps us to act in the right way and make good decisions. Being ethical means being respectful, honest, kind and trustworthy.

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Hope and Faith - EP124
programme.desc: In this episode, we will learn about the values of Faith and Hope. We will discover that hope is a value that allows us to believe that something positive will happen. Faith is having confidence in someone or something. When we have faith in people, we help them to believe in themselves. You must trust in yourself and know that you are capable of achieving it!

programme.desc: A new rival emerges, aiming to destroy the existing X Tower and rebuild it in his image!

programme.desc: Marco Polo is about to return home to Venice when he discovers that his friend Shi La is not an orphan! To find her long-lost mother, Marco, Shi La, and Luigi set out on an adventurous journey across new countries!

programme.title: What On Earth - EP 17
programme.desc: It's International Women's Day and Zachary volunteers to bake Isabelle a cake to celebrate. Leonardo says no problem, he's the baking master, just point him to the baking machine. Zachary isn't so sure. At home, Neela has found out about International Woman's Day and realizes that she's a woman! Raffles tries to explain more, which leads to a broader discussion about other special days.

programme.title: What On Earth - EP 18
programme.desc: After the cake-baking fiasco, Leonardo decides he could be a successful Cake-preneuer. Leonardo hides away in the kitchen looking at the recipe books. By baking cakes. But of course, he's not going to do that baking. Ship is. In school, Mr Han has a favour to ask Raffles: what would Raffles suggest as a gift for a special someone? When Raffles asks who this special someone is, Mr Han gets cagey.

programme.title: The Contenders 26 - EP 33
programme.desc: These are lean times for Germany but Die Mannschaft can never be written off at a major tournament.

programme.title: Moma: Moments of Modern Art - EP 2
programme.desc: From sculptures to tattoos, photography to smartphone art, this show is all about the inspiration of artists and designers. It glances into the world of contemporary art and their dedication at their craft.

programme.title: My Best Friend's An Animal - EP 5
programme.desc: MY BEST FRIEND'S AN ANIMAL is an emotive, heart-warming series which tells the stories of humans who have unlikely and extraordinary friendships with wild animals. Featuring 6 compelling stories per episode and filmed all over the world. The series proves that when it comes to friendship, shape, size, or even species is irrelevant. Respect, trust, and understanding can be found in the most surprising places.

programme.title: Don't Forget the Lyrics S7 - EP 3
programme.desc: Contestants must attempt to sing through and fill in the missing lyrics to TEN of the biggest hit songs of all time! But when the music stops, the contestant must correctly provide the missing song lyrics. If a contestant can successfully make it through the first 9 songs without missing a SINGLE lyric, they'll have the chance to play a 10th and final song for a shot at ONE MILLION DOLLARS!

programme.title: Films & Stars - EP 15
programme.desc: Films and Stars cover the hottest events from the big screen every week.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Homecoming

programme.title: (Live) News Tonight
programme.desc: The daily evening-news programme featuring highlights and coverage of both local and international news with a local perspective.

programme.title: The World's Deadliest Weather S6 - EP 12
programme.desc: Nature is a tempestuous beast, capable of destruction on a level so devastating and claimed the lives of millions. In recent years, these extreme weather events have become more and more commonplace.

programme.title: Deep Blue Sea
programme.desc: Searching for a cure to Alzheimer's disease, a group of scientists on an isolated research facility become the prey, as a trio of intelligent sharks fight back.

programme.title: Super Dad - EP 14 男神不败
programme.desc: Ling Zhi and Chloe met with a car accident and their lives are at stake. Wei Hao is close to breaking down. He immediately rushes down to Zheng Yi's place to ask for the box of chocolates and manages to successfully go back in time to save his wife and daughter. However, he enters a coma thereafter and dreams of himself walking through the netherworld, even seeing his old-aged self...

programme.title: Joys Of Life - EP 5 花样人间
programme.desc: In an old tenement house at Huaxiang Street live several families who play out the acts in life every day: True to his name, Zhao Mingxing "Star", dreams of becoming a star. Zibin, who works in the office of the Radio station, has a leftist younger sister, Sun Lianjing. Han Yongyong is the adopted daughter of Han Jianren, a cook who loves booze. Han Rourou, is the beauty of Huaxiang Street. She is every man's dream girl. Love abounds when these men and women cross paths.

When he regains consciousness, She De took the opportunity to break Hong Yi's superstition. In the process of decluttering, he made a fortune selling the fengshui items to an antique shop, and bringing home items he needs.

programme.title: Fix My Life - EP 4 整你的人生
programme.desc: Luna's video post of her learning badminton from Badminton Championships Winner Yang Zhong Xian was well received by Netizens. Not wanting to be outdone, Man Ying also signed up to learn badminton, and her instructor is Olympic silver medallist Weng Jian Hao. With his high expectations of his students, Man Ying and her peers are pushed to their limits.

programme.title: Go Go Dino S10 - EP 22 帮帮龙出动10海洋救援队

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 - Match Highlights - Semi-Finals: England vs Argentina
programme.desc: England will look to build on their disciplined, resilient campaign, while Argentina aim to combine flair and attacking brilliance to edge another step towards glory. With decades of history, world-class talent and emotions running high, this promises to be a gripping semi-final worthy of the occasion.

programme.title: (Live) FIFA World Cup 2026 - Review Show (90 min) - EP 3
programme.desc: Preview Show for FIFA World Cup 2026. The FIFA World Cup 2026 is the largest edition ever, featuring 48 teams and 104 matches across Canada, Mexico, and the United States from June 11 to July 19, 2026.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 - Match Highlights - Quarter-Finals: France vs Morocco
programme.desc: France brings championship pedigree, attacking quality and big-match experience, while Morocco looks to build on its fearless campaign with resilience, tactical discipline and swift counterattacks. Expect an intense contest where every moment could prove decisive as two ambitious sides battle for a place among the world's final four.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 - Match Highlights - Quarter-Finals: Spain vs Belgium
programme.desc: Spain and Belgium meet in a high-stakes World Cup quarter-final. This clash pits Spain's patient, technical style against Belgium's pace, physicality and clinical finishing. Spain will look to control the tempo through midfield while relying on the creativity of their young stars to unlock Belgium's defence.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 - Quarter-Final: Argentina v Switzerland
programme.desc: Argentina will look to their attacking flair and big-match experience as they chase back-to-back World Cup titles, while Switzerland's disciplined defence and composure under pressure make them dangerous opponents capable of frustrating any side.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 - Match Highlights - Quarter-Finals: Norway vs England
programme.desc: England faces tournament surprise Norway in a thrilling 2026 World Cup Quarter-Final in Miami. This high-stakes clash features an elite goalscoring battle between Harry Kane and Erling Haaland as both nations fight for a coveted semi-final spot.

However, Casper scares away a banker who is coming to foreclose on the woman's house, and this wins her heart for Casper.

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Hope and Faith - EP124
programme.desc: In this episode, we will learn about the values of Faith and Hope. We will discover that hope is a value that allows us to believe that something positive will happen. Faith is having confidence in someone or something. When we have faith in people, we help them to believe in themselves. You must trust in yourself and know that you are capable of achieving it!

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Music Values - EP125
programme.desc: In this episode, we will discover that music helps us express our ideas and even our emotions. The rhythm, the melody, and harmony are the most important elements. Music can help us develop special skills such as: be persistent, be focused, it teaches us to communicate, share, and cooperate with other people. Music has the magic of uniting people because almost everyone shares a love for music!

programme.title: Mellodees - Deck The Halls - EP19
programme.desc: It’s that time of year again! Grab some hot chocolate and your best dancing shoes to help Dee decorate the house!

programme.title: Shaq's Garage - The Rescue - EP125
programme.desc: The Orlanta Zoo needs help transferring some of their animals, but Gronk's carelessness causes problems.

programme.title: Thomas Edison's Secret Lab - Ant-Urbia Disturbia / Unidentified Flying Awesomemobile - EP122
programme.desc: When Kent feels ignored by the other SLKids, he unexpectedly becomes friends with the ants of Ant-Urbia, who eat a special substance from the Kafloogalator that allows them to communicate with Kent and become a super-organism super-friend. / Kent flies Edison’s Awesomobile to France to meet Sheila, but he is mistaken for an alien in a UFO, and the Team Kids must rescue him from an Area 51-type base.

programme.desc: Come join Dee and learn all about different holiday celebrations around the world!

programme.title: Casper the Friendly Ghost - Casper the Friendly Ghost Ep8 - EP108
programme.desc: Depressed by the antics of the other ghosts, Casper leaves home to make friends. After unintentionally scaring several potential pals, Casper befriends two young children. They take him home, where Casper frightens their mother. Casper is again upset because he believes that he will always scare away his potential buddies. However, Casper scares away a banker who is coming to foreclose on the woman's house, and this wins her heart for Casper.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage - Queenie for a Day - EP109
programme.desc: Queenie is too big to go through the fancy carwash she saw on TV. The Shaq Paw has to find a way to cheer her up.

programme.desc: The beyond surreal adventures of Felix The Cat and his friends set in an incredibly weird and fantastical toon world where everything is alive and only dream logic rules. Each episode has three segments.

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Manners when we travel - EP126
programme.desc: In this episode, Nova will take the viewers on a field trip through the different methods of travel. You should never leave your parents or the people you are travelling with! We will review some Planet Tools that will help us to make a calm trip inside the wagons of the train. The most important thing is not to reach the destination, but to enjoy the trip!
